base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of player_one_mario_name_label — a ui (hud_readout) from 1985 super mario bros. Static 'MARIO' text label — appears in HUD left-most Player Name slot when P1 is active. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Static 'MARIO' text label — appears in HUD left-most Player Name slot when P1 is active
